candidates.why: Primary top-line revenue line; appears as the main reported revenue and matches the target exactly.
Revenue subcomponent, not total top-line; should not be used when a total revenue line exists.
Also a valid top-line revenue line, but duplicates Revenue in recent years; useful as fallback across label changes.
Cost line, not revenue.

candidates.row_label: Capital gains/losses on sales/disposals of non current assets
candidates.why: Non-operating gain/loss, not revenue.
Financial income, not operating revenue.
Profit metric, not revenue.

candidates.row_label: Income Available to Com Excl ExtraOrd
candidates.why: Net income metric, not revenue.
Comprehensive income, not revenue.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income - Attributable to Owners of Parent Company - Total
candidates.why: Comprehensive income subtotal, not revenue.

candidates.row_label: Total comprehensive income for the period
candidates.why: Comprehensive income subtotal, not revenue.
Balance sheet asset, not revenue.
Balance sheet liability, not revenue.

variables.notes: Use as a priority list for top-line revenue label changes; do not sum both.

candidates.why: Direct operating cost line and matches COGS concept.
Explicit COGS label and appears identical to Cost of services provided; best semantic match.
Acquisition-related item, not recurring cost of sales.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit COGS label and avoided double counting the duplicate line Cost of services provided.

candidates.why: Development-related operating line above operating income; relevant to R&D/overhead treatment, especially for XSGA-XRD interaction.
Clear SG&A component.
Clear SG&A component.
Clear operating overhead component.
Possible overhead component, but preview shows no values and is less direct than Other external expenses.
Overhead subtotal, but component rows exist so subtotal should be avoided.
Balance sheet asset, not income statement SG&A expense.

variables.notes: Preferred component rows over the subtotal Operating expenses. Included Capitalised development costs because it is a development-related operating line above operating income and should be paired with XRD so XSGA_COMPONENTS - XRD removes R&D-style development activity.

candidates.why: Only clear development-related income statement line; appears above operating income and is the best available R&D proxy.
Balance sheet asset, not period R&D expense.

variables.notes: No dedicated research and development expense line is shown. Used the above-EBIT development-related line as the best available R&D proxy, and mirrored it in XSGA_COMPONENTS to respect the XSGA-XRD subtraction logic.

candidates.why: Primary recurring interest expense line.

Could contain recurring finance costs, but may also include non-interest items; less precise than explicit interest rows.
Minority interest allocation, not interest expense.
Minority interest allocation, not interest expense.
Label exists but appears empty in preview and is less reliable than populated Interest Expenses.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental disclosure version of lease interest; avoid if main line is already selected to prevent duplication/sign inconsistencies.
Balance sheet accrual, not income statement finance cost.
Liability balance, not interest expense.
Equity item, not interest expense.
Equity item, not interest expense.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities

variables.notes: Used granular recurring interest cost components and excluded Other financial expenses to avoid pulling in non-interest financial items.

candidates.row_label: Equity holders of the Parent Company
candidates.why: Income statement attribution of profit, not balance sheet book equity.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income - Attributable to Owners of Parent Company - Total
candidates.why: Income statement comprehensive income, not book equity.
Best match for parent/owner equity excluding non-controlling interests; Total Equity appears to include NCI separately.
Includes non-controlling interests given separate NCI rows; should be avoided when owner equity exists.
Balancing row, not equity measure.
Balancing row, not equity measure.

candidates.row_label: Balancing Item - Total Liability and Equity
candidates.why: Balancing row, not equity measure.
Total balance sheet size, not equity.

variables.notes: Selected owner equity excluding non-controlling interests, consistent with using MIB separately.

candidates.why: Income statement profit allocation, not balance sheet minority equity.
Income statement profit allocation, not balance sheet minority equity.
Explicit balance sheet minority interest line; strong match.

variables.notes: Used the balance sheet minority interest line. Did not add income statement allocation rows because MIB should come from equity, not earnings attribution.
